option_b.name: Full Fix — Recommended
option_b.scope: SSL + mobile + Fresha booking widget integration + above-fold CTA rewrite
option_b.notes: Fresha is free for the salon — no monthly cost objection.

linkedin_approach.precondition: IMAP sweep claire@westfieldhair.co.uk from 07:00 Wednesday. If reply found: act on reply instead, skip LinkedIn permanently.
linkedin_approach.find_profile: Search: Claire [Westfield Hair Beauty Leeds] on LinkedIn. Check for posts in last 60 days before sending — salon sector posts frequently.
linkedin_approach.connection_note_generic: Claire — Westfield Hair & Beauty came up when I was looking at independent salons in Leeds. Noticed something about the online presence worth a quick mention. Connecting in case it's useful.
linkedin_approach.post_reference_upgrade: If recent post found: reference it specifically. See linkedin_connection_notes.json for seasonal topics.
rules: Zero reference to prior email, call, SSL, booking system, or website
Do NOT send a message at connection — wait for acceptance
DO NOT reference the call booked 2026-04-07 — treat as first contact
linkedin_approach.first_message_after_acceptance: Hi Claire — noticed the Westfield Hair & Beauty site doesn't have an online booking option. Happy to share what I spotted if it's useful at all.
linkedin_approach.if_no_connection_in_7_days: Archive as LOST_NO_RESPONSE. No further action.
linkedin_approach.archive_if_linkedin_missed_wednesday: Permanent LOST_NO_RESPONSE. No further action on any channel.

decision_tree_imap_wednesday.if_reply_found_converted: Log CHANGELOG.md — CAMPAIGN MILESTONE #1 — FIRST REVENUE. Invoice today (Option B £350). Skip LinkedIn.
decision_tree_imap_wednesday.if_reply_found_still_interested: Respond warmly. Send proposal A/B. Close this week. Skip LinkedIn.
decision_tree_imap_wednesday.if_reply_found_declined: Mark LOST. Brief reply. No further contact. Skip LinkedIn.
decision_tree_imap_wednesday.if_no_reply: LinkedIn connection note (above). Mark LOST_NO_RESPONSE. Write linkedin_profiles.json.
